description: Triage patterns for /evaluate Not-Verified items (#2289). Each pattern matches a common Not-Verified phrasing against a regex and suggests a cheap read-only command the evaluator can run to promote the item to Verified. Patterns are hand-authored; new patterns require a schema bump if they introduce new promotes_to values.
source: 2026-04-07 /evaluate run on #2282 surfaced 8 Not-Verified items, 5 of which were trivially verifiable with existing tools.

patterns.match: Whether `.*` was actually modified|Whether `.*` was changed
patterns.notes: Matches claims like 'Whether `validate-manifest-completeness.js` was actually modified in #2282'. Evaluator runs the command; non-empty output means the file appears in at least one commit.
Matches AC-style claims about absence (e.g., 'no changes to .claude/rules/*.md'). Promotes when the grep returns EMPTY — proving the absence claim.
Matches 'is X consumed by any code' — proves consumption when a grep returns non-empty results.

patterns.match: Whether .* check reads live .* or .* fixture
patterns.suggestion: Read {validator-path} and look for fixture references
patterns.notes: Matches claims about whether a check reads live data vs a fixture. Requires manual confirmation from the Read result.

patterns.match: Whether .* was resolved chronologically before|Whether .* landed before
patterns.notes: Matches chronological ordering claims. Evaluator compares timestamps from the command output.

patterns.match: Whether .* in px-manager|external repo|outside this repo
patterns.notes: Pattern that deliberately does NOT promote. External-repo claims stay under Not Verified with an explanatory reason.
